requirements.document_or_rule: Electronic submission must follow the current municipal instruction standard for signatures, PDF/A, indexed pieces, legends, and technical file packaging.
requirements.official_doc_id: NORMA INST_CMV_01 - Normas de Instrucao de Processos em Formato Eletronico (2024)
requirements.article_or_section: Condicoes de apresentacao dos elementos instrutorios, pontos 1 a 6
requirements.notes: Use for current NIP-backed municipal submission packaging findings.

requirements.document_or_rule: Parking quantity for housing review in Viseu must use the official PDMV parking baseline.
requirements.official_doc_id: Aviso n.o 5793/2023 - Republicacao do regulamento da alteracao do PDM de Viseu
requirements.notes: No SOURCE_NEEDED fallback allowed for parking quantity in Viseu.

requirements.document_or_rule: The dossier must identify the applicable PDMV class/category of soil through the official ordering extract.
requirements.official_doc_id: Aviso n.o 5793/2023 - Republicacao do regulamento da alteracao do PDM de Viseu
requirements.notes: Use when the file omits class/category framing needed for admissibility or parameter review.

requirements.document_or_rule: Urbanistic parameter review must be grounded in the applicable PDMV category extract and not inferred from drawings alone.
requirements.official_doc_id: Aviso n.o 5793/2023 - Republicacao do regulamento da alteracao do PDM de Viseu
requirements.notes: Use for quadro sinoptico and parameter-table findings lacking category-backed framing.

requirements.document_or_rule: Whenever the operation depends on conditioning or plan overlays, the dossier must identify the relevant official PDMV ordering/constraints extracts.
requirements.official_doc_id: Aviso n.o 12115/2013 - Revisao do Plano Diretor Municipal de Viseu
requirements.article_or_section: Art. 3.o; composicao da Planta de Ordenamento e Planta de Condicionantes
requirements.notes: Use for missing ordering/constraints extracts and plan-dependent conditioning checks.

requirements.document_or_rule: The submission must include the documents and projects required by RJUE, applicable regulations, and the municipal instruction rules.
requirements.notes: Use together with the official NIP extract when checking current municipal packaging/instruction details.
